alkylation reagent: iodoacetate was added and the mixture incubated for 20 min
cleavage agent: The protein mixture was digested with trypsin (600 ng) for 15 h at 37 °C
collision energy: fragmented by CID at 35% collision energy
fragmentation method: fragmented by CID at 35% collision energy
instrument: The LC-MS experiment was performed using Orbitrap Fusion Lumos mass spectrometer
ionization type: used to carry out ESI-MS experiments
reduction reagent: 5 mM DTT, pH 8.0 at 37 °C for 40 min
